generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how expanded domestic security powers have prevented attacks. The 2024 Boston case shows how preemptive data access stopped a plot. Critics ignore that these tools target criminals, not citizens. We need to empower agencies to keep us safe while maintaining accountability. #NationalSecurityFirst
